SMW Credits Creator

The ultimate tool to automate generic credits generation for SMW ROM hacks using the RHR system.

New Feature: Fully compatible with the online SMW Credits Manager at saphros.de/smwcredits/.

🚀 Installation

No installation is required. The tool is portable.

  1. Unzip the downloaded archive completely.
  2. Ensure config.template.json and mapping.json are present in the folder.
  3. Run the SMWCreditsCreator.exe.

🎮 Workflow

1. Setup Project

Click Select RHR Folder and choose your project's root directory.

  • Supported Versions: RHR v5.00 up to v5.13+.
  • Auto-Detection: The tool detects your version via changelog.txt.
  • Configuration Fix: If your project isn't set up for text-based Map16 (required for automation), the tool will warn you. Click Fix Configuration to handle everything automatically (Config update + Initial Export).

2. Prepare Credits Data

You have two options to provide the credits names:

Option A: Online Generator (Recommended)

Use the visual editor at saphros.de/smwcredits/.

  1. Enter your categories and names easily online.
  2. Click the Download JSON button.
  3. Load this .json file into the tool.

Option B: Manual Text File

Create a simple .txt file on your computer.

  • Headers: End lines with a colon : (e.g. "Resources:")
  • Names: One name per line below the header.

Example:

Graphics: Mario World Kaizo Music: Mozart Beethoven

3. Generate & Insert

  1. Load your .json or .txt file in the tool.
  2. Adjust settings (e.g., Font Size 8x8 or 16x16).
  3. Click Generate Map16.
What happens next?
The tool will generate Map16 files containing your text as tiles and automatically run callisto update to insert them into your ROM immediately.

⚠️ Important Notes

  • Callisto Safety: The tool performs a safety callisto save before generating to ensure no data is lost during the Map16 text-format conversion.
  • Mapping: Use the Mapping Tab to customize which tile ID represents which character. This must match your ExGFX font file in Lunar Magic.

❓ Troubleshooting

The window stays black on start?
Wait a few seconds. The application loads the icon delayed to prevent freezing. Check app.log if it persists.

"Invalid Project" Error?
Ensure you selected the root folder (where flips.exe or changelog.txt resides), not the buildtool folder.
